post_text: In 2005 Zwayer was involved in the match fixing scandal which centered around 2. Bundesliga referee Robert Hoyzer who took bribes to fix several matches which he officiated. Zwayer assisted him in a match and allegedly accepted a bribe of 300 euros to avoid critical scenes for Wuppertaler SV. In January 2005 he and three other high-ranking referees informed the DFB about Hoyzer's match fixing. He was subsequently banned from refereeing for 6 months a suspension that was kept secret for several years until the German newspaper Die Zeitpublished a secret file from the German FA.
